notes:
v0.6.34: background queue polling

Pre-v0.6.34 the recipient app only loaded /queue/list on view changes or restart — so files sent to the queue could sit unfetched for hours. Now polls every 20 s in the background plus three short follow-up polls (2/8/20 s) after the WS incoming-notify fires, so a friend's right-click send lands on the recipient's disk within seconds of upload completion.
